mapper.sql: select ea.apply_id, ea.register_id, ea.encounter_id, ea.patient_id, ea.doctor_id, ea.dept_id, ea.apply_type, ea.tech_id, ea.apply_info, ea.apply_position, ea.operator_id, ea.inputer_id, ea.apply_time, ea.exam_time, ea.exam_result, ea.image_url, ea.apply_status, ea.pay_status, ea.remark, ea.create_time, ea.update_time, r.register_no, p.name as patient_name, p.gender, p.age, d.doctor_name, sd.dept_name, mt.tech_name from exam_apply ea left join register r on ea.register_id = r.register_id left join patient p on ea.patient_id = p.patient_id left join doctor d on ea.doctor_id = d.doctor_id left join sys_dept sd on ea.dept_id = sd.dept_id left join medical_technology mt on ea.tech_id = mt.id
mapper.select:
select r.register_id as registerId, r.register_no as registerNo, e.encounter_id as encounterId, r.patient_id as patientId, p.name as patientName, p.gender as gender, p.age as age, r.doctor_id as doctorId, d.doctor_name as doctorName, r.dept_id as deptId, sd.dept_name as deptName, r.register_time as registerTime from register r inner join encounter e on e.register_id = r.register_id left join patient p on p.patient_id = r.patient_id left join doctor d on d.doctor_id = r.doctor_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = r.dept_id
r.register_status = 'registered' and r.doctor_id = #{doctorId}
and (r.register_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by r.register_time desc

select min(t.applyId) as applyId, t.registerId as registerId, t.registerNo as registerNo, min(t.applyTime) as applyTime, max(t.examTime) as examTime, t.payStatus as payStatus, case when t.payStatus = 'paid' then '已缴费' else '待缴费' end as applyStatus, t.doctorName as doctorName, t.deptName as deptName, count(*) as itemCount, group_concat(t.techName order by t.applyId separator '、') as techName, sum(coalesce(t.techPrice, 0)) as techPrice from ( select ea.apply_id as applyId, ea.register_id as registerId, r.register_no as registerNo, ea.apply_time as applyTime, ea.exam_time as examTime, case when lower(coalesce(ea.pay_status, 'unpaid')) in ('paid', '1', '已支付', '已缴费') then 'paid' else 'unpaid' end as payStatus, d.doctor_name as doctorName, sd.dept_name as deptName, mt.tech_name as techName, mt.tech_price as techPrice from exam_apply ea left join register r on ea.register_id = r.register_id left join doctor d on ea.doctor_id = d.doctor_id left join sys_dept sd on ea.dept_id = sd.dept_id left join medical_technology mt on ea.tech_id = mt.id where ea.patient_id = #{patientId} and ea.apply_type in ('CHECK', 'INSPEC', 'LAB') ) t group by t.registerId, t.registerNo, t.doctorName, t.deptName, t.payStatus order by min(t.applyTime) desc, t.registerId desc

select ea.apply_id as applyId, ea.register_id as registerId, ea.patient_id as patientId, ea.apply_type as applyType, ea.apply_info as applyInfo, ea.apply_position as applyPosition, ea.apply_time as applyTime, ea.apply_status as applyStatus, ea.pay_status as payStatus, mt.id as techId, mt.tech_code as techCode, mt.tech_name as techName, mt.tech_price as techPrice from exam_apply ea left join medical_technology mt on ea.tech_id = mt.id where ea.register_id = #{registerId} and ea.apply_type in ('CHECK', 'INSPEC', 'LAB') and lower(coalesce(ea.pay_status, 'unpaid')) not in ('paid', '1', '已支付', '已缴费') order by ea.apply_id asc
mapper.update: update exam_apply set pay_status = 'paid', apply_status = 'paid', update_time = sysdate() where register_id = #{registerId} and apply_type in ('CHECK', 'INSPEC', 'LAB') and lower(coalesce(pay_status, 'unpaid')) not in ('paid', '1', '已支付', '已缴费')
mapper.select: select r.register_id as registerId, r.register_no as registerNo, e.encounter_id as encounterId, r.patient_id as patientId, p.name as patientName, r.doctor_id as doctorId, d.doctor_name as doctorName, r.dept_id as deptId, sd.dept_name as deptName from register r inner join encounter e on e.register_id = r.register_id left join patient p on p.patient_id = r.patient_id left join doctor d on d.doctor_id = r.doctor_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = r.dept_id where r.register_id = #{registerId} order by e.encounter_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into exam_apply
register_id, encounter_id, patient_id, doctor_id, dept_id, apply_type, tech_id, apply_info, apply_position, operator_id, inputer_id, apply_time, exam_time, exam_result, image_url, apply_status, pay_status, remark, create_time, update_time,
#{registerId}, #{encounterId}, #{patientId}, #{doctorId}, #{deptId}, #{applyType}, #{techId}, #{applyInfo}, #{applyPosition}, #{operatorId}, #{inputerId}, #{applyTime}, #{examTime}, #{examResult}, #{imageUrl}, #{applyStatus}, #{payStatus}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from exam_apply where apply_id in
#{applyId}
